body.title: CLOSED: Move superclaude launchers to agent_datacenter/bin/ + symlink
body.result: launchers moved to agent_datacenter/bin/ (9a42d53), TheIgors stub preserved (37720827), ~/.local/bin/superclaude symlink live, agentctl init step 7 wired
body.description:
superclaude, superclaude.bat, superclaude.ps1 live in ~/TheIgors/ root. Move them to agent_datacenter/bin/ (the correct home for user-facing launchers), update internal paths to use CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS instead of hardcoded REPO_DIR for the utility closet reference, create ~/.local/bin/superclaude symlink for system-wide access, add symlink creation to agentctl init for future installs, and leave thin stubs at the TheIgors/ locations so existing aliases don't break.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/bin/superclaude (new), agent_datacenter/bin/superclaude.bat (new), agent_datacenter/bin/superclaude.ps1 (new), agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/cli/agentctl.py (add symlink step to init), ~/TheIgors/superclaude (stub pointing to new location), ~/.local/bin/superclaude (new symlink).
**Design rules:** No TheIgors imports in agent_datacenter side. Use CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS for utility closet path.
**Scope boundary:** IN: file move, CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS path update, symlink creation. OUT: full de-TheIgors of venv path (future), Windows PATH update (future).
**Test plan:** superclaude --version (or --help) from terminal; verify ~/.local/bin/superclaude resolves; verify old ~/TheIgors/superclaude stub still works.
**Pass condition:** Running superclaude from a fresh terminal (via ~/.local/bin/) launches Claude Code correctly.
